mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `group` ORDER BY group_id DESC

SELECT g.group_id, g.name, g.description, g.leader_user_key, g.capacity FROM `group` g JOIN ( SELECT group_id, MAX(created_at) AS latest FROM group_schedule GROUP BY group_id ORDER BY latest DESC LIMIT #{limit} ) rec ON g.group_id = rec.group_id ORDER BY rec.latest DESC
SELECT group_id, name, description, leader_user_key, capacity FROM `group` WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') ORDER BY group_id DESC
